## Test Plan

- [ ] Local unit tests pass.
- [ ] Relevant Android/Compose tests pass or compile.
- [ ] Manual testing completed where applicable.
- [ ] Edge cases and failure scenarios tested.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have completed the assigned story or bug fix according to agreed coding standards.
- [ ] The implementation satisfies the user story and acceptance criteria.
- [ ] The code integrates correctly with existing modules without breaking functionality.
- [ ] All unit tests pass locally.
- [ ] All unit tests pass in CI.
- [ ] Edge cases and failure scenarios have been tested.
- [ ] Input validation is implemented where applicable.
- [ ] Secrets, credentials, and sensitive data are handled securely.
- [ ] No hard-coded secrets, tokens, or credentials exist in the codebase.
- [ ] Code complies with internal security and quality standards.
- [ ] Pull Request includes a clear description of the change.
- [ ] Affected modules and dependencies are listed.
- [ ] Screenshots or mockups are attached for UI-related changes.
- [ ] Pull Request is linked to the correct issue, ticket, or work item in the project tracker.
- [ ] Pull Request is assigned to the Team Architect for review.
- [ ] I confirm this change is complete, tested, documented, and ready for review.
- [ ] I understand that incorrect or incomplete information may result in PR rejection or rollback responsibility.
